title: Recursive descendant progress rollup
description:
Replace the one-level child count (currently epic-only in internal/query/roadmap.go) with a recursive descendant rollup usable at any altitude: a container's progress = fraction of leaf descendants closed. Put it in a NEW file internal/query/rollup.go as a reusable function (do NOT edit roadmap.go — T6 consumes it there, in a later wave, to avoid a same-file collision). Design §3.

Files: NEW internal/query/rollup.go.
acceptance_criteria: rollup unit tests pass for nested project>epic>task trees; returns closed/total leaf-descendant counts at any altitude
closed_reason: Completed: DescendantProgress(t, allTicks) recursive leaf rollup in internal/query/rollup.go; cycle-safe
